is assigned BY THE PRESIDING JUDGE to Department 611 before Judge Taylor to be heard on April 30, 2013 at 9:00 am. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Hearing Of Demurrer And Motion To Strike
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 611

Judge: Lynn O. Taylor
Court Clerk: Jose Rios Merida
Reporter: None

09:05 AM: Cause comes transferred forthwith from Law & Motion via the presiding judge, for hearing of defendants' demurrer and motion to strike. Plaintiff, Lori Williams is present, in pro per. No appearance by or for the defendant. Court hears from the plaintiff. The matter is taken under submission.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Continued To May-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: LORI WILLIAMS, 650.544.4851, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER.
HANNA LEUNG, ESQ., 415.933.9988, FOR DEFENDANTS GEORGE P. SURMAITIS, HANNA LEUNG, D/B/A LEUNG & ASSOCIATES AND ARLENE CAPARAS.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS GEORGE SURMAITIS, HANNA LEUNG, D/B/A LEUNG & ASSOCIATES & arlene CAPARAS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. The first amended complaint as filed identifies causes of action but attaches no factual allegations whatsoever in support of those causes of action. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
